content.text:
Based on my detailed examination of the molecule, I have identified the neighbour atoms of atom 29 (C:29). Here is the result:

**Neighbour atoms of atom 29 (Carbon):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 27 | C |
| 19 | C |
| 34 | C |

**Geomconf_index:** 7704

**Explanation:** Atom 29 is a bridgehead carbon in this bicyclic structure. It is covalently connected to three other carbon atoms: C:27 (which is part of the lactam ring and bonded to N:26 and O:28), C:19 (which is also bonded to F:23 and forms part of the bridged system), and C:34 (which is part of the six-membered ring and bonded to H:35).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 29, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
